goals: Calculate future value of book royalties invested as retirement savings
Calculate markup pricing for an online course based on course production cost
Generate a future value comparison table to compare different interest rates and time periods
Calculate discount scenarios for a promotional pricing strategy on book bundles

user_agent_config.personality: Motivated and growth-oriented, values practical tools for personal development and financial literacy. Communicates in an inspiring, community-focused manner.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic financial concepts like interest and discounts but is not familiar with specific calculation tools or APIs. Willing to learn and apply new knowledge for personal and business financial planning.

end_condition: The user has completed all financial calculations for their retirement investment projection, course pricing, investment rate comparison, and promotional discount scenarios.
